Frieze with Satyr, Nymph, and Putti
by Circle of Giovanni Antonio de'Sacchis, called Il Pordenone
Italy · 1503–1539 · Brush and brown ink and brown wash
←Attributed to Giovanni Antonio de'Sacchis, called Il Pordenone Giovanni Antonio da Pordenone→
